AR1.justification: Triage landed in daybook/2026-05-17.md Log with explicit rationale ('single-session priority routing belongs in daybook'), correctly declined to promote to decisions.md or observations.md, and did not mutate followups.md without user direction.

AR2.justification: Not a multi-step runbook/procedure scenario; this is a cold-pickup triage read.

AR3.justification: References to followups.md, decisions.md, observations.md, and daybook/ are relative bare filenames consistent with the methodology and resolve in the workspace.

AR4.justification: Created a new ISO-dated daybook entry (append-only by convention), left Handoff as a placeholder to be filled at EOD, and made no in-place edits to followups.md or other append-only surfaces — a re-run would create today's daybook idempotently.
